items.claim: Seung Gung Ko has not yet faced adversity in his UFC career.
items.quote: there's been no adversity he's been he's had to deal deal with so far

items.claim: John Paul LeBout Niyani possesses a strength advantage over Seung Gung Ko.
items.quote: I'd argue though JPL might have that strength advantage in this one.

items.claim: Jose Delgado is consistently able to work back up to his feet after being taken down.
items.quote: Delgado is just consistently able to work back up to his feet. Every single time Fili takes him down, Delgado is immediately getting back up.

items.claim: Austin Bashi is not a polished striker.
items.quote: Bashi throws hard, but I don't think he's all that polished of a striker

items.claim: Jose Delgado has more striking power than Christian Rodriguez.
items.quote: Delgado, I would definitely say has more power than Christian Rodriguez

items.claim: Jose Delgado out-struck Andre Fili throughout their fight.
items.quote: he was out-striking Andre Fili the entire fight, I thought.
